help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Urugostay.
help.still_help_desc: Our support team is available 24/7 to help you with any issues or questions.

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.q1: How do I create an account?
getting_started.a1: Click the "Sign Up" button in the top right corner and follow the instructions.
getting_started.a2: Yes, searching and browsing properties is completely free. We only charge a small service fee on successful bookings.

booking.title: Booking a Stay
booking.q1: How do I book a place?
booking.a1: Find a property you like, select your dates, and click the "Book Now" button on the property page.
booking.a2: Cancellation policies vary by host. Check the specific cancellation policy listed on the property page before booking.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.q1: How do I become a host?
hosting.a1: Click on "Become a Host" in your account menu and fill out your property details for approval.
hosting.a2: We take a 3% commission on every booking to cover payment processing and platform maintenance.

security.title: Payments & Security
security.a1: Yes, we use industry-standard encrypted payment processing to ensure your data is always safe.
security.a2: You are charged as soon as the host confirms your booking request.

payment.terms_text: By clicking "Complete Payment", you agree to the property's booking conditions and Urugostay's customer terms. Your payment information is encrypted and securely processed.
payment.success_message: Your reservation at {{name}} is now fully confirmed.
payment.help_text: Need help? Contact our support at

notifications.empty_desc: We'll let you know when something important happens.
